name: Amaretto Cheesecake Delite
recipeIngredient: 10 1/2 oz Pkg. lite soft silken tofu
16 oz Lower fat cream cheese, softened
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, combine all ingredients for the crust. Press evenly into the bottom of a 9-inch springform pan.
2. Using an electric mixer, combine tofu and cream cheese until smooth. Add EQUAL or sugar and mix thoroughly. Add egg whites and whole eggs to ingredients and continue to mix until well blended. Add Amaretto and vanilla.
3. Pour batter over crust in springform pan or divide into two prepared pie crusts.
4. Bake at 300°F for 1 hour in the springform pan, or 40 minutes for the two prepared crusts.
5. Heat 2 tbsp sugar in a non-stick pan until it turns golden brown. Toss almonds in sugar to coat. Remove and let cool on wax paper. Break apart when cooled and arrange almonds around edge of cake.
6. Refrigerate. Serves 16.
Note: 1/2 cup chocolate cookie crumbs can also be sprinkled around the outside of the cheesecake for a different taste combination.
